name: Jerk Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Quarter the potatoes, leaving the skins on. Place them in a bowl.
3. Add the minced garlic, pickapeppa sauce, and dried basil leaves to the bowl with the potatoes.
4. Drizzle enough Spanish olive oil over the potatoes to fully coat them.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Mix all ingredients together using your hands until well combined.
7. Transfer the potatoes to a foil-lined loaf pan.
8. Cover the top of the potatoes with foil.
9. Bake in the preheated oven for 45-50 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender.
